title: EB resource-access coherence pass — bluegreen grant split + posture
description: Single-file EB deliverable closing 2 gap classes surfaced by Cat 3 coverage drift suite: dangling-resourceRefs (1) + grantNotInCatalog (1). Splits ag-server-do-primary into bluegreen-pair grants (14->15 accessGrants) and adds 2 hostPosture entries (1->3, posture=ssh-key-reachable) for the two new server FK targets. EB-only execution; instance retro-landed at S8-closed in SR per the EB-pre-SR-ship recovery pattern (sixth in-band confirmation of FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1 captured at PR #124).

outputs.description: Split ag-server-do-primary into ag-server-do-primary-blue + ag-server-do-primary-green per bluegreen production topology. accessGrants count 14 -> 15.
acceptanceCriteria: ag-server-do-primary-blue present with serverRef matching production blue droplet
ag-server-do-primary-green present with serverRef matching production green droplet
Both grants carry am-doctl access method

outputs.description: Add 2 new hostPosture entries (posture=ssh-key-reachable) for the two new bluegreen server FK targets. hostPosture count 1 -> 3.
acceptanceCriteria: hostPosture entry for server-do-primary-blue with posture=ssh-key-reachable
hostPosture entry for server-do-primary-green with posture=ssh-key-reachable
Both entries reference real server hostnames per current production topology

preMerge: Schema pre-validation gate in apply.py with ajv-cli --strict=false -c ajv-formats
L4 patch verified flag invocation matches CI exactly

transitions.trigger: EB-chat authored spec body against canonical deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0 (EB-side, no SR cross-repo landing — EB-pre-SR-ship pattern)
EB-chat staged execution via apply.py + commit_and_merge.sh (S5 skipped per EB-pre-SR-ship retro-land pattern)
EB PR #295 merged at a254412 (squash-merge clean, no --admin, CI green first time)
SR retro-landing + TRUTH-DELIVERED #7 authoring (EB-pre-SR-ship recovery pattern, 6th in-band confirmation)

notes:
EB-only execution deliverable closing 2 gap classes from Cat 3 coverage drift suite. EB authored + executed without the canonical cross-repo SR-first landing pattern; SR retro-lands the instance at S8-closed.

**EB-pre-SR-ship pattern observation (6th in-band confirmation):**
This is the 6th observation of EB-chat shipping without first landing the spec via SR cross-repo execution shape. Pattern is being tracked at FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1 (P2, open, filed PR #124). L4 doctrine refinement pending — codify the deviation as acceptable for EB-only execution deliverables, OR tighten doctrine via EB CI check requiring SR cross-repo landing first.

**PR #294 lessons applied (from EB channel relay 12:48 PDT):**
- Schema pre-validation gate in apply.py — ajv-cli runs against new content before write
- L4 patch caught flag mismatch (--strict=false -c ajv-formats to match CI exactly)
- commit_and_merge.sh two-pass interactive flow (both PR #294 bugs fixed: --commit branch reachable, clean-state check expects apply.py output)
- First-time CI green — single commit, no fixup arc

Both deferred FUs file in luh-tech/Ectropy-Business follow-up-register.json by EB-chat in the next EB deliverable. Not SR-scope.

**Substrate-before-write skill — multiple in-band confirmations during this closure authoring:**
SR-chat authored Step 2 PATH-B v1 + Step 3 v1 in the dispatch without reading canonical deliverable.schema.json transitions enum/format or truth-delivered.schema.json field shape. Terminal caught both classes of violation at substrate-read + ajv-validate time, reported verbatim per HARD RULE 5, did not autonomously correct. v2 corrections authored against canonical schemas + reference instance (TRUTH-DELIVERED #6) shapes. The skill (PR #125 b488841) fired terminal-side via REFUSE-AND-SURFACE discipline despite not being loaded as runtime context — substrate evidence that the skill's discipline is propagating through memory rules + REFUSE-AND-SURFACE pattern even before the runtime delivery layer is built.
